name: AnalysisObject.AnalysisObjectEnum
summary: All subclasses of analysis objects are defined here. This enumeration can be used to select certain types of analysis objects.

enum_values.name: ANALYSIS_NOT_DEFINED
enum_values.summary: The analysis object type is not defined.

enum_values.name: ANALYSIS_MODEL
enum_values.summary: This type is for selecting analysis models from the current Tekla Structures model.

enum_values.name: ANALYSIS_PART
enum_values.summary: This type is for selecting analysis parts from the current analysis model.

enum_values.name: ANALYSIS_BAR
enum_values.summary: This type is for selecting analysis bars from the current analysis model.

enum_values.name: ANALYSIS_AREA
enum_values.summary: This type is for selecting analysis areas from the current analysis model.

enum_values.name: ANALYSIS_VOLUME
enum_values.summary: This type is for selecting analysis volumes from the current analysis model.

enum_values.name: ANALYSIS_MEMBER
enum_values.summary: This type is for selecting analysis members from the current analysis model.

enum_values.name: ANALYSIS_DECOMPOSED_LOAD_NODE
enum_values.summary: This type is for selecting decomposed node loads from the current analysis model.

enum_values.name: ANALYSIS_DECOMPOSED_LOAD_BAR
enum_values.summary: This type is for selecting decomposed bar loads from the current analysis model.
